name: SparkplugRow
description: One virtualized Sparkplug tree row: group, edge node (with health meta and hover actions), device, or metric (type/value/last-seen/badges).

props.name: row
props.description: SparkplugTreeRow from build-sparkplug-tree (kind: group | node | device | metric).

props.name: nowMs
props.description: Reference now for relative ages (from the store snapshot).

notes: Figma is not linked yet; stories use local fixtures. Node actions are hover-revealed (same affordance as MqttTopicRow's broker-status button).
